assessment.note: Communication feedback is still sitting with her, suggesting a mild hit to confidence/energy; also flags a likely clarity thread around what the feedback means.

new_queue.label: Communication feedback
new_queue.name: That communication feedback — what part of it are you still processing?
new_queue.description: Drills into the feedback thread to locate the specific issue and whether it is about expectations, delivery, or confidence.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What kind of support from me would actually change your week right now?
new_queue.description: Gets concrete about the help Nina wants, rather than generic support language.

new_queue.label: Next-step move
new_queue.name: What would you most like to have moving differently by our next check-in?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the conversation into an open next move without sounding checklist-driven.
